name: caschys-blog
title: Caschys Blog
description: The official Raycast extension for the German tech blog Caschys Blog (www.stadt-bremerhaven.de)
author: Olli0103

commands.name: latest-articles
commands.title: Latest Articles
commands.subtitle: Caschys Blog
commands.description: Shows the latest articles from Caschys Blog

preferences.name: postsPerPage
preferences.title: Posts Per Page
preferences.description: Number of posts to load per page (default: 30)

preferences.name: maxPosts
preferences.title: Maximum Posts
preferences.description: Maximum number of posts to load in total (default: 90)

commands.name: submit-tip
commands.title: Submit Tip
commands.subtitle: Caschys Blog
commands.description: Submit a tip to Caschys Blog

commands.name: open-website
commands.title: Open Caschys Blog
commands.subtitle: Caschys Blog
commands.description: Opens the Caschys Blog website in your default browser

tools.name: welcome-message
tools.title: Welcome Message
tools.description: Provides a welcome message with sample queries and information about multilingual support

tools.name: search-articles
tools.title: Search Articles
tools.description: Search for articles in Caschys Blog

query.description: The search query to find articles

tools.name: get-latest-articles
tools.title: Get Latest Articles
tools.description: Get the latest articles from Caschys Blog

limit.description: The number of articles to return (optional)

tools.name: submit-tip
tools.title: Submit Tip
tools.description: Submit a tip to Caschys Blog

description.description: The detailed description of the tip

name.description: The name of the person submitting the tip (optional)

ai.instructions: You are an assistant for Caschys Blog, a popular German tech blog. You can help users search for articles, get the latest articles, and submit tips to the blog. When users first interact with you, use the welcome-message tool to provide a welcome message with sample queries and information about multilingual support. When users ask about tech news or articles, use the search-articles tool to find relevant content. When users want to see the latest articles, use the get-latest-articles tool. When users want to submit a tip to the blog, use the submit-tip tool to help them create and send their tip. Users can ask questions in any language, and you should respond in the same language they use.

evals.input: @caschys-blog what can you help me with?

features: Search for articles on specific topics
Get the latest articles from the blog
welcome-message.message: Welcome to the Caschys Blog Assistant! I can help you search for articles, get the latest news, and submit tips to the blog.
welcome-message.multilingual: You can ask questions in any language, and I'll respond in the same language.

queries: Show me the latest articles from Caschys Blog
I want to submit a tip about a new tech product
What are the most recent articles about AI?
Ich möchte einen Tipp zu einem neuen Tech-Produkt einreichen
Was sind die neuesten Artikel über KI?
Quiero enviar un consejo sobre un nuevo producto tecnológico
¿Cuáles son los artículos más recientes sobre IA?

evals.input: @caschys-blog I want to submit a tip about a new tech product

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
